creator: aa8vb@nc.rr.com
text:
From: <fenner@FreeBSD.org>
	Date: Sun, 21 Oct 2001 10:00:02 -0700 (PDT)
	Subject: FreeBSD ports: 2 unfetchable distfiles: graphics/vterrain-apps,graphics
	/vterrain-sdk

Fix: So much for vterrain.org keeping recent distfiles handy.  I've
        copied the distfiles to my public_distfiles dir on freefall, and
        they will be available when the hourly mirror takes place.  The
        attached patches point the ports to these files.
How-To-Repeat: 
	Build port
